description.en: Navigate to pages and verify URLs and titles.
description.id: Navigasi ke halaman dan verifikasi URL serta judul.

instructions.en:
# Page Navigation

Master the fundamentals of navigating between pages!

## Core Methods

```javascript
await page.goto('https://example.com');
await page.url();    // Get current URL
await page.title();  // Get page title
```

## Navigation Options

```javascript
await page.goto('/login', { 
    waitUntil: 'networkidle' 
});
```

## Your Task
1. Navigate to the login page (`/login`)
2. Store the page title in `result`

> [!NOTE]
> In this simulated environment, `page.goto()` is a mock that updates the internal state. You can "navigate" to any URL to satisfy the logic.
instructions.id:
# Navigasi Halaman

Kuasai dasar-dasar navigasi antar halaman!

## Metode Inti

```javascript
await page.goto('https://example.com');
await page.url();    // Ambil URL saat ini
await page.title();  // Ambil judul halaman
```

## Opsi Navigasi

```javascript
await page.goto('/login', { 
    waitUntil: 'networkidle' 
});
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Navigasi ke halaman login (`/login`)
2. Simpan judul halaman di `result`

> [!NOTE]
> Dalam lingkungan simulasi ini, `page.goto()` adalah mock yang memperbarui status internal. Kamu bisa "navigasi" ke URL mana pun untuk memenuhi logika.

challenges.htmlContent: Login Page

description.en: Master different types of click interactions.
description.id: Kuasai berbagai jenis interaksi klik.

instructions.en:
# Click Actions

Playwright offers several click methods!

## Basic Click

```javascript
await page.click('#submit-btn');
await page.locator('.menu').click();
```

## Click Variations

```javascript
await page.dblclick('#item');     // Double-click
await page.click('#menu', { button: 'right' });  // Right-click
await page.click('#link', { force: true });      // Force click
```

## Your Task
1. Click the increment button 3 times
2. Get the counter value
instructions.id:
# Aksi Klik

Playwright menawarkan beberapa metode klik!

## Klik Dasar

```javascript
await page.click('#submit-btn');
await page.locator('.menu').click();
```

## Variasi Klik

```javascript
await page.dblclick('#item');     // Double-click
await page.click('#menu', { button: 'right' });  // Click kanan
await page.click('#link', { force: true });      // Paksa click (force click)
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Klik tombol increment sebanyak 3 kali
2. Dapatkan nilai counter

challenges.htmlContent: 0

description.id: Masukkan teks ke dalam field formulir.

instructions.en:
# Fill & Type

Two ways to enter text in Playwright!

## fill() - Replace All

```javascript
await page.fill('#email', 'test@example.com');
```

## type() - Character by Character

```javascript
await page.type('#search', 'hello', { delay: 100 });
```

## Clear and Fill

```javascript
await page.locator('#input').clear();
await page.locator('#input').fill('new value');
```

## Your Task
1. Fill the email field with "qa@test.com"
2. Fill the password field with "secret123"
3. Get the email field value
instructions.id:
# Isi & Ketik

Dua cara untuk memasukkan teks di Playwright!

## fill() - Ganti Semua

```javascript
await page.fill('#email', 'test@example.com');
```

## type() - Karakter demi Karakter

```javascript
await page.type('#search', 'hello', { delay: 100 });
```

## Bersihkan dan Isi

```javascript
await page.locator('#input').clear();
await page.locator('#input').fill('new value');
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Isi field email dengan "qa@test.com"
2. Isi field password dengan "secret123"
3. Dapatkan nilai field email

description.en: Work with select elements and dropdowns.
description.id: Bekerja dengan elemen select dan dropdown.

instructions.en:
# Select Dropdowns

Playwright makes dropdown selection easy!

## Select by Value

```javascript
await page.selectOption('#country', 'usa');
```

## Select by Label

```javascript
await page.selectOption('#size', { label: 'Large' });
```

## Select Multiple

```javascript
await page.selectOption('#colors', ['red', 'blue']);
```

## Your Task
1. Select "JavaScript" from the language dropdown
2. Get the selected value
instructions.id:
# Pilih Dropdown

Playwright membuat pemilihan dropdown menjadi mudah!

## Pilih berdasarkan Nilai (Value)

```javascript
await page.selectOption('#country', 'usa');
```

## Pilih berdasarkan Label

```javascript
await page.selectOption('#size', { label: 'Large' });
```

## Pilih Banyak (Multiple)

```javascript
await page.selectOption('#colors', ['red', 'blue']);
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Pilih "JavaScript" dari dropdown bahasa
2. Dapatkan nilai yang dipilih

description.id: Ubah status checkbox dan tombol radio.

instructions.en:
# Checkbox & Radio

Toggle and verify checkbox/radio state!

## Check/Uncheck

```javascript
await page.check('#agree');
await page.uncheck('#newsletter');
```

## Verify State

```javascript
await page.isChecked('#terms');  // true/false
```

## Locator Methods

```javascript
await page.locator('#option').check();
const checked = await page.locator('#option').isChecked();
```

## Your Task
1. Check the "Accept Terms" checkbox
2. Verify it's checked
instructions.id:
# Checkbox & Radio

Ubah dan verifikasi status checkbox/radio!

## Check/Uncheck

```javascript
await page.check('#agree');
await page.uncheck('#newsletter');
```

## Verifikasi Status

```javascript
await page.isChecked('#terms');  // true/false
```

## Metode Locator

```javascript
await page.locator('#option').check();
const checked = await page.locator('#option').isChecked();
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Centang checkbox "Accept Terms"
2. Verifikasi bahwa itu sudah dicentang

description.id: Simulasikan input keyboard dan shortcut.

instructions.en:
# Keyboard Actions

Simulate keyboard input!

## Press Keys

```javascript
await page.press('#input', 'Enter');
await page.press('body', 'Escape');
```

## Key Combinations

```javascript

await page.press('#editor', 'Control+c');
```

## Type with Delay

```javascript
await page.type('#search', 'playwright', { delay: 50 });
```

## Your Task
1. Focus the search input
2. Type "Playwright" 
3. Press Enter to search
4. Get the search results text


description.id: Tangani input unggah file.

instructions.en:
# File Upload

Upload files in your tests using `setInputFiles`!

## setInputFiles

```javascript
// Simple usage (recommended for sandbox)
await page.setInputFiles('#file-input', 'my-file.pdf');
```

> [!NOTE]
> Since this runs in the browser, Node.js-only APIs like `Buffer` are not available. Use simple string names for simulated uploads.

## Your Task
1. Upload a file named **'test-report.pdf'** to the `#file-input`
2. Store the displayed filename in `result`
instructions.id:
# Unggah File

Unggah file dalam tes Anda menggunakan `setInputFiles`!

## setInputFiles

```javascript
// Penggunaan sederhana (disarankan untuk sandbox)
await page.setInputFiles('#file-input', 'my-file.pdf');
```

> [!NOTE]
> Karena ini berjalan di browser, API khusus Node.js seperti `Buffer` tidak tersedia. Gunakan nama string sederhana untuk simulasi unggahan.

## Tugas Kamu
1. Unggah file bernama **'test-report.pdf'** ke `#file-input`
2. Simpan nama file yang ditampilkan di `result`

instructions.en:
# Working with iFrames

Access content inside iframes!

## Frame by Name/URL

```javascript
const frame = page.frame({ name: 'my-frame' });
const frame = page.frame({ url: /embed/ });
```

## frameLocator

```javascript
const frame = page.frameLocator('#widget-frame');
await frame.locator('button').click();
```

## Get All Frames

```javascript
const frames = page.frames();
```

## Your Task
1. Access the iframe content
2. Get the text inside the iframe
instructions.id:

Akses konten di dalam iframe!

```javascript
const frame = page.frame({ name: 'my-frame' });
const frame = page.frame({ url: /embed/ });
```

## frameLocator

```javascript
const frame = page.frameLocator('#widget-frame');
await frame.locator('button').click();
```

## Ambil Semua Frame

```javascript
const frames = page.frames();
```

## Tugas Kamu

2. Dapatkan teks di dalam iframe

challenges.htmlContent: Main Page

description.en: Handle dynamic content updates and sort verification.
description.id: Tangani pembaruan konten dinamis dan verifikasi pengurutan.

instructions.en:
# Dynamic Table Sorting

Tables often re-render when sorted. We need to handle this dynamism!

## Verification Strategy
1. **Initial State:** Verify order before action
2. **Action:** Click sort header
3. **Wait:** Ensure update happens (wait for specific first row text/attribute)
4. **Verify:** Check new order

## Common Pitfall
Checking text immediately after click might return the *old* data before the re-render completes!

## Your Task
1. Sort the table by "Status" (Click "Status" header)
2. Verify the **first row** contains "Active" in the status column.
instructions.id:
# Pengurutan Tabel Dinamis

Tabel sering kali me-render ulang saat diurutkan. Kita perlu menangani dinamisme ini!

## Strategi Verifikasi
1. **Kondisi Awal:** Verifikasi urutan sebelum aksi
2. **Aksi:** Klik header pengurutan (sort header)
3. **Tunggu:** Pastikan pembaruan terjadi (tunggu teks/atribut baris pertama yang spesifik)
4. **Verifikasi:** Periksa urutan baru

## Jebakan Umum (Common Pitfall)
Memeriksa teks segera setelah klik mungkin mengembalikan data *lama* sebelum proses render ulang selesai!

## Tugas Kamu
1. Urutkan tabel berdasarkan "Status" (Klik header "Status")
2. Verifikasi bahwa **baris pertama** berisi "Active" di kolom status.

description.en: Complete a full checkout flow using all navigation skills.
description.id: Selesaikan alur checkout lengkap menggunakan semua keterampilan navigasi.

instructions.en:
# Scenario: E-Commerce Checkout

You're testing a checkout flow that requires multiple actions in sequence.

## The Challenge

Complete a purchase by:
1. Adding a product to cart (click button)
2. Updating quantity in the cart (fill input)
3. Checking "Express Shipping" (checkbox)
4. Clicking "Checkout" button
5. Verifying order confirmation

## Your Mission

Chain all the actions together and return the confirmation message.

> **Tip:** Each action depends on the previous one completing!
instructions.id:
# Skenario: Checkout E-Commerce

Anda sedang menguji alur checkout yang memerlukan beberapa aksi secara berurutan.

## Tantangannya

Selesaikan pembelian dengan:
1. Menambahkan produk ke keranjang (klik tombol)
2. Memperbarui jumlah/kuantitas di keranjang (isi input)
3. Mencentang "Express Shipping" (checkbox)
4. Mengklik tombol "Checkout"
5. Memverifikasi konfirmasi pesanan

## Misi Kamu

Rantai semua aksi bersama-sama dan kembalikan pesan konfirmasi.

> **Tip:** Setiap aksi bergantung pada penyelesaian aksi sebelumnya!

challenges.htmlContent: Widget Pro

description.id: Gunakan locator berbasis aksesibilitas dengan getByRole.

instructions.en:
# getByRole

Accessibility-first locators are the recommended approach!

## Common Roles

```javascript
page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Submit' });
page.getByRole('link', { name: 'Home' });
page.getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Email' });
page.getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'Agree' });
page.getByRole('heading', { level: 1 });
```

## Why getByRole?

- Tests user-visible behavior
- Works with screen readers
- More resilient to changes

## Your Task
1. Find the button with role "button" and name "Sign Up"
2. Click it and get the result
instructions.id:
# getByRole

Locator berbasis aksesibilitas (accessibility-first) adalah pendekatan yang direkomendasikan!

## Role Umum

```javascript
page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Submit' });
page.getByRole('link', { name: 'Home' });
page.getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Email' });
page.getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'Agree' });
page.getByRole('heading', { level: 1 });
```

## Kenapa getByRole?

- Menguji perilaku yang terlihat oleh pengguna
- Bekerja dengan screen reader
- Lebih tangguh terhadap perubahan struktur HTML

## Tugas Kamu
1. Temukan tombol dengan role "button" dan nama "Sign Up"
2. Klik tombol tersebut dan dapatkan hasilnya

description.en: Find elements by their text content.
description.id: Temukan elemen berdasarkan konten teksnya.

instructions.en:
# getByText

Find elements by visible text!

## Exact Match

```javascript
page.getByText('Hello World');
```

## Substring Match

```javascript
page.getByText('Hello', { exact: false });
```

## Regex Match

```javascript
page.getByText(/welcome/i);  // Case insensitive
```

## Your Task
1. Find the element containing "Click me"
2. Click it
3. Get the result
instructions.id:
# getByText

Temukan elemen berdasarkan teks yang terlihat!

## Pencocokan Eksak (Exact Match)

```javascript
page.getByText('Hello World');
```

## Pencocokan Substring

```javascript
page.getByText('Hello', { exact: false });
```

## Pencocokan Regex

```javascript
page.getByText(/welcome/i);  // Tidak peka huruf besar/kecil (case insensitive)
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Temukan elemen yang mengandung teks "Click me"
2. Klik elemen tersebut
3. Dapatkan hasilnya

description.en: Find form inputs by their label text.
description.id: Temukan input formulir berdasarkan teks labelnya.

instructions.en:
# getByLabel

Perfect for form accessibility!

## How It Works

```javascript
// Finds input associated with label "Email"
page.getByLabel('Email');
```

## Works With

- `<label for="id">` + `<input id="id">`
- `<label><input>Name</label>` (wrapped)
- `aria-labelledby` attribute

## Your Task
1. Fill the "Username" input
2. Fill the "Password" input
3. Get the username value
instructions.id:
# getByLabel

Sangat cocok untuk aksesibilitas formulir!

## Cara Kerjanya

```javascript
// Menemukan input yang terkait dengan label "Email"
page.getByLabel('Email');
```

## Bisa Bekerja Dengan

- `<label for="id">` + `<input id="id">`
- `<label><input>Name</label>` (dibungkus)
- Atribut `aria-labelledby` 

## Tugas Kamu
1. Isi input "Username"
2. Isi input "Password"
3. Dapatkan nilai dari username

description.id: Temukan input berdasarkan teks placeholder.

instructions.en:
# getByPlaceholder

Find inputs by their placeholder!

## Usage

```javascript
page.getByPlaceholder('Enter your email');
page.getByPlaceholder('Search...');
```

## Best For

- Inputs without visible labels
- Search boxes
- Quick prototypes

## Your Task
1. Fill the search input (placeholder: "Search...")
2. Get the input value
instructions.id:
# getByPlaceholder

Temukan input berdasarkan placeholder-nya!

## Penggunaan

```javascript
page.getByPlaceholder('Enter your email');
page.getByPlaceholder('Search...');
```

## Terbaik Untuk

- Input tanpa label yang terlihat
- Kotak pencarian
- Prototipe cepat

## Tugas Kamu
1. Isi input pencarian (placeholder: "Search...")
2. Dapatkan nilai inputnya

description.en: Use custom test attributes for reliable selection.
description.id: Gunakan atribut tes kustom untuk seleksi yang andal.

instructions.en:
# getByTestId

Use custom test IDs for stable locators!

## Default Attribute

```javascript
// Finds data-testid="submit-btn"
page.getByTestId('submit-btn');
```

## Configure Custom Attribute

```javascript
// In playwright.config.ts
use: {
  testIdAttribute: 'data-test-id'
}
```

## Best Practices

- Add test IDs during development
- Use semantic names
- Keep them stable

## Your Task
1. Click the button with testid "add-to-cart"
2. Get the cart count
instructions.id:
# getByTestId

Gunakan test ID kustom untuk locator yang stabil!

## Atribut Default

```javascript
// Menemukan data-testid="submit-btn"
page.getByTestId('submit-btn');
```

## Konfigurasi Atribut Kustom

```javascript
// Di playwright.config.ts
use: {
  testIdAttribute: 'data-test-id'
}
```

## Praktik Terbaik

- Tambahkan test ID selama pengembangan
- Gunakan nama semantik
- Jaga agar tetap stabil

## Tugas Kamu
1. Klik tombol dengan testid "add-to-cart"
2. Dapatkan jumlah item di keranjang (cart count)

description.en: Chain locators with filter, first, nth.
description.id: Rantai locator dengan filter, first, nth.

instructions.en:
# Locator Chaining

Refine locators with chaining methods!

## filter()

```javascript
page.locator('.item').filter({ hasText: 'Active' });
page.locator('.row').filter({ has: page.locator('.icon') });
```

## first(), last(), nth()

```javascript
page.locator('li').first();
page.locator('li').last();
page.locator('li').nth(2);  // Third item (0-indexed)
```

## Chaining

```javascript
page.locator('.list')
    .locator('.item')
    .filter({ hasText: 'Active' })
    .first();
```

## Your Task
1. Get the second item in the list
2. Return its text
instructions.id:
# Perantaian Locator

Pertajam locator dengan metode perantaian (chaining)!

## filter()

```javascript
page.locator('.item').filter({ hasText: 'Active' });
page.locator('.row').filter({ has: page.locator('.icon') });
```

## first(), last(), nth()

```javascript
page.locator('li').first();
page.locator('li').last();
page.locator('li').nth(2);  // Item ketiga (indeks mulai dari 0)
```

## Perantaian (Chaining)

```javascript
page.locator('.list')
    .locator('.item')
    .filter({ hasText: 'Active' })
    .first();
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Dapatkan item kedua dalam daftar
2. Kembalikan teksnya

description.id: Bekerja dengan iframe menggunakan frameLocator.

instructions.en:
# Frame Locators

Access iframe content with frameLocator!

## Basic Usage

```javascript
const frame = page.frameLocator('#my-iframe');
await frame.locator('button').click();
```

## Chain with Locators

```javascript
page.frameLocator('iframe')
    .locator('.content')
    .getByRole('button');
```

## Nested Frames

```javascript
page.frameLocator('#outer')
    .frameLocator('#inner')
    .locator('div');
```

## Your Task
1. Access the iframe
2. Click the button inside
3. Get the result text
instructions.id:
# Locator Frame

Akses konten iframe dengan frameLocator!

## Penggunaan Dasar

```javascript
const frame = page.frameLocator('#my-iframe');
await frame.locator('button').click();
```

## Rantai dengan Locator

```javascript
page.frameLocator('iframe')
    .locator('.content')
    .getByRole('button');
```

## Frame Bersarang (Nested Frames)

```javascript
page.frameLocator('#outer')
    .frameLocator('#inner')
    .locator('div');
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Akses iframe
2. Klik tombol di dalamnya
3. Dapatkan teks hasilnya

description.id: Tangani banyak elemen secara efisien.

instructions.en:
# List & Items

Work with multiple elements!

## Count Elements

```javascript
const count = await page.locator('.item').count();
```

## Get All Text

```javascript
const texts = await page.locator('.item').allTextContents();
```

## Iterate

```javascript
const items = page.locator('.item');
for (let i = 0; i < await items.count(); i++) {
    await items.nth(i).click();
}
```

## All Inner Texts

```javascript
const allTexts = await page.locator('li').allInnerTexts();
```

## Your Task
1. Count the number of list items
2. Return the count as string
instructions.id:
# Daftar & Item

Bekerja dengan banyak elemen!

## Hitung Elemen

```javascript
const count = await page.locator('.item').count();
```

## Ambil Semua Teks

```javascript
const texts = await page.locator('.item').allTextContents();
```

## Iterasi

```javascript
const items = page.locator('.item');
for (let i = 0; i < await items.count(); i++) {
    await items.nth(i).click();
}
```

## Semua Inner Text

```javascript
const allTexts = await page.locator('li').allInnerTexts();
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Hitung jumlah item dalam daftar
2. Kembalikan jumlahnya sebagai string

description.en: Use advanced locators to find products in a complex grid.
description.id: Gunakan locator lanjutan untuk menemukan produk dalam grid yang kompleks.

instructions.en:
# Scenario: Dynamic Product Grid

You're testing a product catalog with filtering and dynamic content.

## The Challenge

Find and click the "Add to Cart" button for a specific product:
1. Product name contains "Pro"
2. Product is in stock (has "In Stock" badge)
3. Get the confirmation message

## Your Mission

Use locator chaining, filtering, and sibling navigation to find the right element!

> **Tip:** Chain filter() to narrow down, then use locator() to find the button!
instructions.id:
# Skenario: Grid Produk Dinamis

Anda sedang menguji katalog produk dengan pemfilteran dan konten dinamis.

## Tantangannya

Cari dan klik tombol "Add to Cart" untuk produk tertentu:
1. Nama produk mengandung "Pro"
2. Produk tersedia (ada lencana "In Stock")
3. Dapatkan pesan konfirmasi

## Misi Kamu

Gunakan perantaian locator, pemfilteran, dan navigasi sibling untuk menemukan elemen yang tepat!

> **Tip:** Rantai filter() untuk mempersempit pencarian, lalu gunakan locator() untuk mencari tombol!

description.id: Asert status visibilitas elemen.

instructions.en:
# toBeVisible & toBeHidden

Check if elements are visible or hidden!

## Visibility Assertions

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('#modal')).toBeVisible();
await expect(page.locator('.spinner')).toBeHidden();
await expect(page.locator('.menu')).not.toBeVisible();
```

## Common Use Cases

- Modals appearing/disappearing
- Loading spinners
- Conditional UI elements

## Your Task
1. Click to show the modal
2. Assert the modal is visible
instructions.id:
# toBeVisible & toBeHidden

Periksa apakah elemen terlihat atau tersembunyi!

## Asersi Visibilitas

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('#modal')).toBeVisible();
await expect(page.locator('.spinner')).toBeHidden();
await expect(page.locator('.menu')).not.toBeVisible();
```

## Kasus Penggunaan Umum

- Modal yang muncul/hilang
- Loading spinner
- Elemen UI kondisional

## Tugas Kamu
1. Klik untuk menampilkan modal
2. Asert bahwa modal tersebut terlihat

description.id: Asert konten teks elemen.

instructions.en:
# toHaveText

Validate text content!

## Exact Match

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('h1')).toHaveText('Welcome');
```

## Partial Match

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('p')).toContainText('hello');
```

## Regex

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('.status')).toHaveText(/success/i);
```

## Your Task
1. Assert the heading has text "Hello World"
2. Assert the paragraph contains "Playwright"

2. Assert it has the correct value

description.en: Assert checkbox, disabled, and other states.
description.id: Asert status checkbox, disabled, dan status lainnya.

instructions.en:
# State Assertions

Check element states!

## Checked State

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('#terms')).toBeChecked();
await expect(page.locator('#opt-out')).not.toBeChecked();
```

## Disabled/Enabled

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('#submit')).toBeDisabled();
await expect(page.locator('#next')).toBeEnabled();
```

## Editable/ReadOnly

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('#notes')).toBeEditable();
```

## Your Task
1. Check the terms checkbox
2. Assert it is checked
3. Assert submit button is enabled
instructions.id:
# Asersi Status

Periksa status elemen!

## Status Centang (Checked)

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('#terms')).toBeChecked();
await expect(page.locator('#opt-out')).not.toBeChecked();
```

## Nonaktif/Aktif (Disabled/Enabled)

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('#submit')).toBeDisabled();
await expect(page.locator('#next')).toBeEnabled();
```

## Dapat Diedit (Editable)

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('#notes')).toBeEditable();
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Centang checkbox persetujuan (terms)
2. Asert bahwa itu sudah dicentang
3. Asert bahwa tombol submit sudah aktif (enabled)

description.id: Asert jumlah elemen.

instructions.en:
# toHaveCount

Check number of matching elements!

## Count Assertion

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('.item')).toHaveCount(5);
await expect(page.locator('.error')).toHaveCount(0);
```

## After Adding Items

```javascript
await page.click('#add');
await expect(page.locator('li')).toHaveCount(4);
```

## Your Task
1. Count the list items (should be 4)
2. Add a new item
3. Assert count is now 5
instructions.id:
# toHaveCount

Periksa jumlah elemen yang cocok!

## Asersi Jumlah (Count Assertion)

```javascript
await expect(page.locator('.item')).toHaveCount(5);
await expect(page.locator('.error')).toHaveCount(0);
```

## Setelah Menambahkan Item

```javascript
await page.click('#add');
await expect(page.locator('li')).toHaveCount(4);
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Hitung item daftar (seharusnya ada 4)
2. Tambahkan item baru
3. Asert bahwa jumlahnya sekarang menjadi 5

2. Asert bahwa judulnya cocok

description.en: Continue test execution after assertion failures.
description.id: Lanjutkan eksekusi tes setelah kegagalan asersi.

instructions.en:
# Soft Assertions

Continue after failures!

## Regular vs Soft

```javascript
// Regular - stops on failure
await expect(locator).toHaveText('A');

// Soft - continues on failure
await expect.soft(locator).toHaveText('A');
```

## Use Cases

- Form validation (check all fields)
- Dashboard verification
- Batch assertions

## Check for Failures

```javascript
const errors = expect.soft.errors;
```

## Your Task
1. Use soft assertions to check multiple elements
2. All assertions should pass
instructions.id:
# Soft Assertions

Lanjutkan setelah kegagalan!

## Regular vs Soft

```javascript
// Regular - berhenti saat gagal
await expect(locator).toHaveText('A');

// Soft - lanjut meskipun gagal
await expect.soft(locator).toHaveText('A');
```

## Kasus Penggunaan

- Validasi formulir (periksa semua field)
- Verifikasi dashboard
- Batch asersi

## Periksa Kegagalan

```javascript
const errors = expect.soft.errors;
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Gunakan soft assertion untuk memeriksa beberapa elemen
2. Semua asersi harus berhasil

description.en: Verify all aspects of a complex form validation.
description.id: Verifikasi semua aspek dari validasi formulir yang kompleks.

instructions.en:
# Scenario: Form Validation Suite

You're testing a registration form with multiple validation states.

## The Challenge

Verify ALL of these assertions pass:
1. Email field shows error when invalid
2. Password field shows requirements
3. Submit button is disabled until form is valid
4. After fixing, submit button becomes enabled

## Your Mission

Use multiple assertion types to verify the complete form state!

> **Tip:** Use expect() for each verification, and chain them together!
instructions.id:
# Skenario: Suite Validasi Formulir

Anda sedang menguji formulir pendaftaran dengan beberapa status validasi.

## Tantangannya

Verifikasi SEMUA asersi berikut berhasil:
1. Field email menampilkan error saat tidak valid
2. Field password menampilkan persyaratan
3. Tombol submit dinonaktifkan (disabled) sampai formulir valid
4. Setelah diperbaiki, tombol submit menjadi aktif (enabled)

## Misi Kamu

Gunakan beberapa jenis asersi untuk memverifikasi status formulir yang lengkap!

> **Tip:** Gunakan expect() untuk setiap verifikasi, dan rantai mereka bersama-sama!

description.id: Tunggu respon API yang spesifik.

instructions.en:
# waitForResponse

Wait for API responses!

## Basic Usage

```javascript
const response = await page.waitForResponse('/api/users');
```

## With Pattern

```javascript
const response = await page.waitForResponse(
    resp => resp.url().includes('/api/') && resp.status() === 200
);
```

## With Action

```javascript
const [response] = await Promise.all([
    page.waitForResponse('/api/save'),
    page.click('#save')
]);
const data = await response.json();
```

## Your Task
1. Click the "Load Data" button (triggers API call)
2. Wait for the /api/data response using Promise.all
3. Get the status text from `#status` element
instructions.id:
# waitForResponse

Tunggu respon API!

## Penggunaan Dasar

```javascript
const response = await page.waitForResponse('/api/users');
```

## Dengan Pola (Pattern)

```javascript
const response = await page.waitForResponse(
    resp => resp.url().includes('/api/') && resp.status() === 200
);
```

## Dengan Aksi

```javascript
const [response] = await Promise.all([
    page.waitForResponse('/api/save'),
    page.click('#save')
]);
const data = await response.json();
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Klik tombol "Load Data" (memicu panggilan API)
2. Tunggu respon /api/data menggunakan Promise.all
3. Dapatkan teks status dari elemen `#status`

description.id: Tunggu kondisi JavaScript kustom.

challenges.htmlContent: 0

description.id: Konfigurasi timeout kustom.

instructions.en:
# Timeout Configuration

Customize timeout behavior!

## Action Timeout

```javascript
await page.click('#btn', { timeout: 5000 });
await page.fill('#input', 'text', { timeout: 10000 });
```

## Navigation Timeout

```javascript
await page.goto('/slow-page', { timeout: 60000 });
```

## Wait Timeout

```javascript
await page.waitForSelector('#elem', { timeout: 3000 });
```

## Global Config

```javascript
// In playwright.config.ts
use: {
  actionTimeout: 10000,
  navigationTimeout: 30000,
}
```

## Your Task
1. Click an element with custom timeout
2. Verify it worked
instructions.id:
# Konfigurasi Timeout

Sesuaikan perilaku timeout!

## Timeout Aksi (Action Timeout)

```javascript
await page.click('#btn', { timeout: 5000 });
await page.fill('#input', 'text', { timeout: 10000 });
```

## Timeout Navigasi

```javascript
await page.goto('/slow-page', { timeout: 60000 });
```

## Timeout Penungguan (Wait Timeout)

```javascript
await page.waitForSelector('#elem', { timeout: 3000 });
```

## Konfigurasi Global

```javascript
// Di playwright.config.ts
use: {
  actionTimeout: 10000,
  navigationTimeout: 30000,
}
```

## Tugas Kamu
1. Klik elemen dengan opsi timeout kustom
2. Verifikasi bahwa itu berhasil

description.en: Handle async updates with proper wait strategies.
description.id: Tangani pembaruan asinkron dengan strategi penungguan yang tepat.

instructions.en:
# Scenario: Polling Dashboard

You're testing a dashboard that polls for real-time updates.

## The Challenge

The dashboard:
1. Shows "Loading..." initially
2. After delay, shows "Connected"
3. Then starts polling for data
4. Eventually shows "Data received: 42"

## Your Mission

Wait for each state transition and return the final data value.

> **Tip:** Use waitForSelector or waitForFunction to handle the async states!
instructions.id:
# Skenario: Dashboard Polling

Anda sedang menguji dashboard yang melakukan polling untuk pembaruan waktu nyata.

## Tantangannya

Dashboard tersebut:
1. Menampilkan "Loading..." di awal
2. Setelah jeda, menampilkan "Connected"
3. Kemudian mulai melakukan polling untuk data
4. Akhirnya menampilkan "Data received: 42"

## Misi Kamu

Tunggu setiap transisi status dan kembalikan nilai data akhir.

> **Tip:** Gunakan waitForSelector atau waitForFunction untuk menangani status asinkron tersebut!
